rationale: The exact official MTA Q48 row at p001_b0053 (sha256:2d86bb2a28c2950f7d20c2914620b66ed3a177234eeab7a66616d68708e2977f) establishes a June 30, 2025 lifecycle boundary: the existing Q48 was discontinued and replaced by Q90, while a new Q48 began serving the former Q46 Glen Oaks branch and made limited stops on Union Turnpike west of 188 Street. The historical LaGuardia-serving Q48 remains explicitly targeted to route_q48-serves-lga-2011, while the new Glen Oaks service must be created as route_q48-glen-oaks-2025. A reviewed do-not-merge decision protects that lifecycle split before apply. Q46, Q90, and Q45 are source context only; this bundle creates no route identity or route edge for them. Route-anchor disposition and override changes remain deferred until the new route is canonical.
